clusters.title: Sam Neill, "Jurassic Park" and "The Piano" star, dies at 78
clusters.neutral_headline: Jurassic Park actor Sam Neill dies aged 78
bullet_summary: Sam Neill, the genre-spanning New Zealand actor best known for his starring role in the “Jurassic Park” movies, has died, his family said Monday
Reported by CBS News, NPR News, Al Jazeera and others

items.title: Sam Neill, "Jurassic Park" and "The Piano" star, dies at 78
items.standfirst: New Zealand actor Sam Neill, known for "Jurassic Park" and "The Piano," died Monday at 78, his family says.
items.content: New Zealand actor Sam Neill, known for "Jurassic Park" and "The Piano," died Monday at 78, his family says.

items.title: Sam Neill, known for 'Jurassic Park' and 'The Piano,' dies at 78, his family says
items.standfirst: In 2023, Neill disclosed he had been diagnosed with angioimmunoblastic T-cell lymphoma, a rare type of non-Hodgkin lymphoma. Neill died on Monday in Sydney, according to a statement posted to the actor's social media page.
items.content: In 2023, Neill disclosed he had been diagnosed with angioimmunoblastic T-cell lymphoma, a rare type of non-Hodgkin lymphoma. Neill died on Monday in Sydney, according to a statement posted to the actor's social media page.(Image credit: Richard Shotwell/AP Photo)

items.content: Death of New Zealand actor in Sydney was 'sudden and unexpected', according to a family statement.

items.content: New Zealand actor Sam Neill, best known for his roles in "Jurassic Park" and "The Piano', died Monday at the age of 78, according to a statement from his family on social media.

clusters.title: Firefighting planes scrambled from south of France to tackle huge wildfire near Paris
clusters.neutral_headline: Planes sent to tackle wildfires of 'exceptional scale' near Paris
bullet_summary: The blaze, which is unusual in its proximity to Paris, raced across about 800 hectares (2,000 acres) of forest and was still spreading early on Monday, officials said
A fast-moving wildfire that has so far scorched about 800 hectares of the Fontainebleau forest southest of Paris may have been "intentionally set", French Interior Minister Laurent Nunez said Monday

items.title: Firefighting planes scrambled from south of France to tackle huge wildfire near Paris
items.standfirst: Officials say blaze in Fontainebleau forest is of ‘exceptional scale’, with 900 homes evacuated and road and rail links hitEurope live – latest updatesFirefighters are tackling a blaze of unprecedented scale sweeping through Fontainebleau forest south-east of Paris.The fire began late on Sunday afternoon in the one-time royal hunting preserve about 40 miles (60km) from the capital, which today is dotted with villages. The blaze, which is unusual in its proximity to Paris, raced across about 800 hectares (2,000 acres) of forest and was still spreading early on Monday, officials said. Continue reading...
items.content: Officials say blaze in Fontainebleau forest is of ‘exceptional scale’, with 900 homes evacuated and road and rail links hitEurope live – latest updatesFirefighters are tackling a blaze of unprecedented scale sweeping through Fontainebleau forest south-east of Paris.The fire began late on Sunday afternoon in the one-time royal hunting preserve about 40 miles (60km) from the capital, which today is dotted with villages. The blaze, which is unusual in its proximity to Paris, raced across about 800 hectares (2,000 acres) of forest and was still spreading early on Monday, officials said. Continue reading...

items.title: Wildfire of "exceptional scale" burning near Paris
items.standfirst: The wildfire is piling pressure on a region facing its third heat wave since May.
items.content: The wildfire is piling pressure on a region facing its third heat wave since May.

items.title: Wildfire of 'exceptional scale' breaks out in forest near Paris
items.standfirst: A wildfire of "exceptional scale" has broken out in a forest near Paris, as the country battles it third heatwave of the summer.
items.content: A wildfire of "exceptional scale" has broken out in a forest near Paris, as the country battles it third heatwave of the summer.

items.title: Planes sent to tackle wildfires of 'exceptional scale' near Paris
items.standfirst: It was the first time firefighting planes had been sent up from the normally drier and hotter south of the country to tackle fires in the Paris region.
items.content: It was the first time firefighting planes had been sent up from the normally drier and hotter south of the country to tackle fires in the Paris region.

items.title: Massive Fontainebleau wildfire near Paris ‘possibly intentional’, interior minister says
items.standfirst: A fast-moving wildfire that has so far scorched about 800 hectares of the Fontainebleau forest southest of Paris may have been "intentionally set", French Interior Minister Laurent Nunez said Monday. The fire prompted France to deploy two firefighting Canadair planes from the country's south as crews battled to contain the blaze, the first time such aircraft have been used in the greater Paris region.
items.content: A fast-moving wildfire that has so far scorched about 800 hectares of the Fontainebleau forest southest of Paris may have been "intentionally set", French Interior Minister Laurent Nunez said Monday. The fire prompted France to deploy two firefighting Canadair planes from the country's south as crews battled to contain the blaze, the first time such aircraft have been used in the greater Paris region.

clusters.title: McConnell says a fall led to his hospitalization, breaking weeks of silence
clusters.neutral_headline: US Senator Mitch McConnell says absence due to fall and pneumonia
bullet_summary: Mitch McConnell on Sunday revealed that a fall led to his hospitalization, breaking the silence about his condition after weeks of mounting speculation about the Kentucky Republican's health
McConnell, 84, said in a statement that he has undergone a battery of tests as doctors try to determine what led to his fall

items.title: McConnell says a fall led to his hospitalization, breaking weeks of silence
items.standfirst: Sen. Mitch McConnell on Sunday revealed that a fall led to his hospitalization, breaking the silence about his condition after weeks of mounting speculation about the Kentucky Republican's health.
items.content: Sen. Mitch McConnell on Sunday revealed that a fall led to his hospitalization, breaking the silence about his condition after weeks of mounting speculation about the Kentucky Republican's health.(Image credit: Mark Humphrey)

items.title: McConnell says he was "briefly unconscious," had pneumonia in health update
items.standfirst: Sen. Mitch McConnell released a statement on his health on Sunday along with a photo of himself and his wife, Elaine Chao, after questions swirled about his condition.
items.content: Sen. Mitch McConnell released a statement on his health on Sunday along with a photo of himself and his wife, Elaine Chao, after questions swirled about his condition.

items.title: US Senator Mitch McConnell says absence due to fall and pneumonia
items.standfirst: The veteran Republican says he will not return to work "quite yet", in his first statement following weeks of speculation about his health.
items.content: The veteran Republican says he will not return to work "quite yet", in his first statement following weeks of speculation about his health.

items.title: Mitch McConnell releases health update, says he is ‘regaining’ strength
items.standfirst: The US Republican senator has been absent from Congress during a weeks-long hospitalisation, spurring party concern.
items.content: The US Republican senator has been absent from Congress during a weeks-long hospitalisation, spurring party concern.

items.title: Mitch McConnell reveals fall led to hospitalization after weeks of silence
items.standfirst: Senator says in statement he has undergone battery of tests after weeks of mounting speculation about his healthThe US senator Mitch McConnell on Sunday revealed for the first time that a fall led to his hospitalization, breaking the silence about the Kentucky Republican’s condition after weeks of mounting speculation about his health.McConnell, 84, said in a statement that he has undergone a battery of tests as doctors try to determine what led to his fall. He explained the long silence about his condition by saying that “folks of my generation often hesitate to share the vulnerability that comes with growing older”. Continue reading...
items.content: Senator says in statement he has undergone battery of tests after weeks of mounting speculation about his healthThe US senator Mitch McConnell on Sunday revealed for the first time that a fall led to his hospitalization, breaking the silence about the Kentucky Republican’s condition after weeks of mounting speculation about his health.McConnell, 84, said in a statement that he has undergone a battery of tests as doctors try to determine what led to his fall. He explained the long silence about his condition by saying that “folks of my generation often hesitate to share the vulnerability that comes with growing older”. Continue reading...

clusters.title: Multiple people dead after a shooting at a Toronto festival
clusters.neutral_headline: Toronto shooting: two dead and four injured at Salsa on St Clair street festival
bullet_summary: Toronto police deputy chief Frank Barredo said investigators recovered two firearms after the shooting, which was reported at 8
Clair festival, a celebration of Latino culture, police said
Two men have been killed and four other people have been wounded in a shooting at a street festival in Toronto, police have said

items.title: Multiple people dead after a shooting at a Toronto festival
items.standfirst: Multiple people are dead and several are injured after a gunman opened fire at festival celebrating Latino culture in Toronto.
items.content: Multiple people are dead and several are injured after a gunman opened fire at festival celebrating Latino culture in Toronto.

items.title: Toronto shooting: two dead and four injured at Salsa on St Clair street festival
items.standfirst: Police say two people exchanged gunfire in shooting that mayor called an ‘irresponsible act of violence’ in festival attended by familiesA shooting near a Toronto street festival killed two men and wounded four other people on Saturday evening, police said, adding that what initially prompted an active-shooter warning was an exchange of gunfire between two people targeting each other.Toronto police deputy chief Frank Barredo said investigators recovered two firearms after the shooting, which was reported at 8.12pm near St. Clair Avenue West and Arlington Avenue, where the Salsa on St Clair festival was underway. Continue reading...
items.content: Police say two people exchanged gunfire in shooting that mayor called an ‘irresponsible act of violence’ in festival attended by familiesA shooting near a Toronto street festival killed two men and wounded four other people on Saturday evening, police said, adding that what initially prompted an active-shooter warning was an exchange of gunfire between two people targeting each other.Toronto police deputy chief Frank Barredo said investigators recovered two firearms after the shooting, which was reported at 8.12pm near St. Clair Avenue West and Arlington Avenue, where the Salsa on St Clair festival was underway. Continue reading...

items.content: Police say there was an exchange of gunfire between two individuals at the festival, and two firearms had been recovered from the scene.

clusters.title: At least 27 killed, 22 critically injured after fire engulfs Bangkok bar
clusters.neutral_headline: At least 27 killed, 22 critically injured after fire engulfs Bangkok bar
bullet_summary: At least 27 people were killed and 63 injured after a fire tore through a Bangkok bar late on Sunday, Thai officials said
Bangkok Governor Chadchart Sittipunt said the blaze spread rapidly, with smoke believed to be the main cause of death

items.title: At least 27 killed, 22 critically injured after fire engulfs Bangkok bar
items.standfirst: Firefighters arrived at the scene in the Chatuchak district to find patrons running through flames to escape.
items.content: Firefighters arrived at the scene in the Chatuchak district to find patrons running through flames to escape.

items.title: At least 27 dead as fire engulfs popular Bangkok pub near Chatuchak market
items.standfirst: At least 27 people were killed and 63 injured, many critically, after a fire ripped through a popular pub in Bangkok.
items.content: At least 27 people were killed and 63 injured, many critically, after a fire ripped through a popular pub in Bangkok.

items.title: Massive fire at Bangkok pub kills at least 27 people
items.standfirst: At least 27 people were killed and 63 injured after a fire tore through a Bangkok bar late on Sunday, Thai officials said. Bangkok Governor Chadchart Sittipunt said the blaze spread rapidly, with smoke believed to be the main cause of death. Authorities have launched an investigation into the cause.
items.content: At least 27 people were killed and 63 injured after a fire tore through a Bangkok bar late on Sunday, Thai officials said. Bangkok Governor Chadchart Sittipunt said the blaze spread rapidly, with smoke believed to be the main cause of death. Authorities have launched an investigation into the cause.

clusters.title: Sen. Lindsey Graham's cause of death was aortic dissection, medical examiner says
clusters.neutral_headline: US Senator Lindsey Graham's sudden death linked to cardiac issue
bullet_summary: President Trump paid tribute to the late senator, who was reportedly scheduled to do an interview on Sunday
US Senator Lindsey Graham, a close ally of President Donald Trump and a leading Republican voice on foreign policy, died on Saturday after a brief illness at the age of 71, his office said
The District of Columbia medical examiner said the preliminary cause of death was an aortic dissection linked to arteriosclerotic cardiovascular disease

items.title: US senator and close Trump ally Lindsey Graham dies after 'brief and sudden illness'
items.standfirst: A spokesman for the 71-year-old South Carolina senator says initial findings suggest Graham's cause of death was related to his heart.
items.content: A spokesman for the 71-year-old South Carolina senator says initial findings suggest Graham's cause of death was related to his heart.

items.title: US Senator Lindsey Graham's sudden death linked to cardiac issue
items.standfirst: US Senator Lindsey Graham, a close ally of President Donald Trump and a leading Republican voice on foreign policy, died on Saturday after a brief illness at the age of 71, his office said. The District of Columbia medical examiner said the preliminary cause of death was an aortic dissection linked to arteriosclerotic cardiovascular disease.
items.content: US Senator Lindsey Graham, a close ally of President Donald Trump and a leading Republican voice on foreign policy, died on Saturday after a brief illness at the age of 71, his office said. The District of Columbia medical examiner said the preliminary cause of death was an aortic dissection linked to arteriosclerotic cardiovascular disease.
